notes: Baseline lacked relationship tracking, plot flags, and achievements entirely
Skill consistently outperforms baseline: 92% vs 50% average pass rate (+42 percentage points)
Achievement point sum (exactly 1000) failed in 2/3 with-skill runs - the skill should emphasize this constraint more strongly
Key differentiators: fairmath usage, fake_choice/choice balance, opposed_pair stats, pronoun system, hub pattern with disable_reuse
Baseline never produces fairmath, opposed_pair, or pronoun systems without explicit skill guidance
Skill adds ~27s average execution time and ~19K tokens but dramatically improves output quality
Space station eval scored perfect 100% with skill - the most complex prompt benefited most from skill guidance
